parameters.apprise_url_plus: mailgun://${ customer_secrets.{{ params.user_secret }} }@${ customer_secrets.{{ params.host_secret }} }/${ customer_secrets.{{ params.apikey_secret }} }/
parameters.description: Send notifications to your own Mailgun destination through the UnitySVC gateway. POST the unified message envelope {title, body, type, format}; the gateway composes an Apprise mailgun:// URL from your stored secrets and delivers via apprise.unitysvc.dev. The free apprise channel uses your own stored credentials; the apprise-plus channel binds extra per-enrollment destinations via parameters.

apikey_secret.description: Name of the customer secret holding this enrollment's Mailgun apikey

host_secret.description: Name of the customer secret holding this enrollment's Mailgun host

user_secret.description: Name of the customer secret holding this enrollment's Mailgun user
